_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: However, U0126, PD184352, and rapamycin could not restore the MMP1 downregulation, but instead exacerbated it
details: Rapamycin could not restore MMP1 downregulation in NFFs but instead exacerbated it
